name: Salad Dressing with Ginger
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate a small knob of ginger, about half an inch in size.
2. Mix the grated ginger into 1/2 cup of high-quality olive oil until well combined.
3. Add 1 to 1-1/2 tablespoons of vinegar to the mixture.
4. Steep one whole garlic clove in the dressing for a few minutes.
5. Pour over chicken and buckwheat or Oriental, or health food noodles, and you'll never miss salt again.
